title: bstack .control/policy.yaml v1
description: Top-level schema for the substrate's policy.yaml. Composes setpoint.v1.json and gate.v1.json into a workspace policy.

version.description: Schema version. `1.0` and any `1.x` are v1 (handled by this schema). Breaking changes bump to `2.0` + new schema file.

profile.description: Active profile — selects which gate set is enforced.

gates.description: Hard + soft gates. Hard gates block agent actions; soft gates are advisory.

ci_watch.description: Config for the P9 productive-wait watcher (poll intervals, classifier rules).

ci_heal.description: Known-failure → auto-fix recipes for self-healing CI.

auto_merge.description: When the substrate is allowed to auto-merge a PR (path filters, required reviewers, score thresholds).
